content.text:
{"tests":[{"filename":"001_basic_rename.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'alpha\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
"$UTIL" "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "alpha" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "destination content was not moved source content" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"SOURCE DEST rename","expected":"DEST has SOURCE content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"002_sources_to_directory.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
mkdir "$tmpdir/dir"
printf 'a\n' > "$tmpdir/a"
printf 'b\n' > "$tmpdir/b"
"$UTIL" "$tmpdir/a" "$tmpdir/b" "$tmpdir/dir"
actual=$(find "$tmpdir/dir" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort | paste -sd, -)
if [[ "$actual" == "a,b" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "sources were not moved into destination directory" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"SOURCE... DIRECTORY form","expected":"Directory contains both moved source basenames","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"003_target_directory_option.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
mkdir "$tmpdir/target"
printf 'payload\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
"$UTIL" -t "$tmpdir/target" "$tmpdir/src"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/target/src")" == "payload" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-t did not move source into target directory" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-t/--target-directory","expected":"Target directory contains moved source file","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"004_no_target_directory_positive.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'data\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
"$UTIL" -T "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "data" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-T rename did not create destination file" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-T/--no-target-directory with file DEST","expected":"DEST file has SOURCE content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"005_no_target_directory_existing_dir_fails.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'data\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
mkdir "$tmpdir/destdir"
set +e
"$UTIL" -T "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/destdir" >/dev/null 2>&1
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-T unexpectedly allowed file to replace existing directory" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-T treats existing directory DEST as normal file","expected":"Utility exits nonzero","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"006_no_clobber_keeps_destination.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" -n "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-n overwrote an existing destination" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-n/--no-clobber","expected":"Existing DEST content is unchanged","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"007_force_overwrites_destination.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" -f "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst" </dev/null
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "new" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-f did not overwrite existing destination" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-f/--force","expected":"Existing DEST content is replaced","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"008_interactive_decline_keeps_destination.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" -i "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst" <<< "n" >/dev/null 2>&1
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-i did not honor a negative overwrite response" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-i/--interactive prompt before overwrite","expected":"Declining prompt leaves existing DEST unchanged","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"009_final_clobber_option_wins.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" -n -f "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst" </dev/null
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "new" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "final -f did not override earlier -n" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"Only final one of -i/-f/-n takes effect","expected":"Final -f causes DEST to be overwritten","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"010_backup_simple.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
SIMPLE_BACKUP_SUFFIX='~' "$UTIL" --backup=simple "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst~")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--backup=simple did not preserve old destination backup" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--backup=simple","expected":"Simple backup contains old DEST content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"011_b_option_makes_backup.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
VERSION_CONTROL=simple SIMPLE_BACKUP_SUFFIX='~' "$UTIL" -b "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst~")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-b did not create a simple backup of destination" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-b backup option","expected":"Backup file contains old DEST content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"012_suffix_overrides_backup_suffix.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" --backup=simple --suffix=.bak "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst.bak")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--suffix did not set backup suffix" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-S/--suffix with backup","expected":"Backup using custom suffix contains old DEST content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"013_backup_numbered.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" --backup=numbered "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst.~1~")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--backup=numbered did not create numbered backup" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--backup=numbered control method","expected":"Numbered backup contains old DEST content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"014_update_none_skips_existing.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" --update=none "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--update=none replaced an existing destination" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--update=none","expected":"Existing DEST content is unchanged","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"015_update_none_fail_errors_on_skip.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
set +e
"$UTIL" --update=none-fail "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst" >/dev/null 2>&1
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--update=none-fail did not fail for skipped destination" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--update=none-fail on existing DEST","expected":"Utility exits nonzero","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"016_update_older_replaces_older_dest.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
touch -d '2001-01-01 00:00:00' "$tmpdir/src"
touch -d '2000-01-01 00:00:00' "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" --update=older "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "new" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--update=older did not replace older destination" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--update=older replaces older destination","expected":"Older DEST content is replaced","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"017_update_older_skips_newer_dest.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
touch -d '2000-01-01 00:00:00' "$tmpdir/src"
touch -d '2001-01-01 00:00:00' "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" --update=older "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "old" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--update=older replaced a newer destination" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--update=older skips newer destination","expected":"Newer DEST content is unchanged","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"018_u_equivalent_to_update_older.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'new\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
printf 'old\n' > "$tmpdir/dst"
touch -d '2001-01-01 00:00:00' "$tmpdir/src"
touch -d '2000-01-01 00:00:00' "$tmpdir/dst"
"$UTIL" -u "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "new" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-u did not behave like --update=older" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-u equivalent to --update=older","expected":"Older DEST content is replaced","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"019_exchange_files.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'A\n' > "$tmpdir/a"
printf 'B\n' > "$tmpdir/b"
"$UTIL" --exchange "$tmpdir/a" "$tmpdir/b"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/a")" == "B" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--exchange did not put destination content at source path" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--exchange source and destination","expected":"SOURCE path has former DEST content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"020_strip_trailing_slashes.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
mkdir "$tmpdir/real"
ln -s "$tmpdir/real" "$tmpdir/link"
"$UTIL" --strip-trailing-slashes "$tmpdir/link/" "$tmpdir/movedlink"
if [[ -L "$tmpdir/movedlink" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--strip-trailing-slashes did not move the symlink source" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--strip-trailing-slashes on SOURCE","expected":"Destination is the moved symlink","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"021_verbose_outputs_action.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'data\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
out=$("$UTIL" -v "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst")
if [[ -n "$out" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "-v produced no explanation" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-v/--verbose","expected":"Verbose invocation emits an explanation","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"022_debug_implies_verbose_output.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'data\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
out=$("$UTIL" --debug "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst" 2>&1)
if [[ -n "$out" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--debug produced no explanation" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--debug implies -v","expected":"Debug invocation emits an explanation","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"023_no_copy_accepts_successful_rename.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
printf 'data\n' > "$tmpdir/src"
"$UTIL" --no-copy "$tmpdir/src" "$tmpdir/dst"
if [[ "$(cat "$tmpdir/dst")" == "data" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--no-copy did not allow a successful rename" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--no-copy with a rename that does not require copying","expected":"DEST has SOURCE content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"024_missing_source_fails.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
set +e
"$UTIL" "$tmpdir/missing" "$tmpdir/dst" >/dev/null 2>&1
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "missing source unexpectedly succeeded" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"Nonexistent SOURCE","expected":"Utility exits nonzero","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"025_help_displays_usage.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out=$("$UTIL" --help)
if [[ "$out" == *"Usage:"* ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--help did not display usage" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--help","expected":"Help output contains Usage","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"026_version_outputs_information.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out=$("$UTIL" --version)
if [[ "$out" == *"mv"* ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "--version did not output version information" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--version","expected":"Version output mentions mv","expected_to_fail":false}]}
